privileged_info_summary: The college_deadline_manager task uses entirely synthetic data created programmatically. The initial dataset contains 6 college entries with intentionally inconsistent date formats (5 different format patterns) stored as text strings in an ODS file. The task requires 180 seconds timeout, allows maximum 12 steps, has medium difficulty, and uses sparse rewards. Success requires meeting 75% of 4 criteria: standardizing dates, adding formulas, sorting by urgency, and applying conditional formatting. All data values and task parameters have been verified directly from task.json, setup_task.sh, and README.md.
